Correct syntax for variable annotation that should fail at runtime
in a certain manner. More examples are in test_grammar and test_parser.
__annotations__
(/usr/lib64/python3.9/test/ann_module3.py
	f_bad_ann
C_OKN
returnc
selfr	
__init__
C_OK.__init__
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
intr
	D_bad_annNr
sfel
D_bad_ann.__init__r
no_such_name
attrr
	g_bad_ann
__doc__r
<module>
